name: Yunnan Aluminium Co., Ltd.
summary: Yunnan Aluminium Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells aluminum and carbon products in China. Its products include aluminum foils and strips, electrical round aluminum poles, cast aluminum alloys, aluminum ingots, aluminum carbon products, and alumina. The company was formerly known as Yunnan Aluminum Plant. Yunnan Aluminium Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Kunming, China.
